title: tragacantha coronilla
intro: Tragacantha coronilla, also known as Coronilla or Cornillen, is a plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of promoting relaxation, reducing inflammation, and soothing digestive issues. Tragacantha coronilla can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
